summary: iOS | FOCUS 2 | Apps settings section is missing
scenario: Missing "Apps" settings section on Focus 2 device in iOS app
description_clean: The "Apps" settings section is missing on the Focus 2 device when navigating to Device settings in the iOS app. According to the Focus 2 UI specs, the Apps section should be present with Amazon Alexa and Tile options.
steps: Navigate to Device settings for the Focus 2 device
expected: The 'Apps' settings section should be present with Amazon Alexa and Tile options.
